overview: Dimir Faeries is a Pauper U/B tempo deck that leverages small flying creatures and instant-speed interaction to control the board while steadily draining the opponent's life total. By combining Spellstutter Sprite's life loss triggers with Snuff Out's conditional counters, the deck applies constant pressure and disrupts key threats. Lorien Revealed serves as a board-clearing finisher that stabilizes the game state and provides crucial life gain.
win_conditions: Gradually reduce opponent life total through repeated Spellstutter Sprite triggers
Control the board with Snuff Out and -1/-1 counters to outlast aggressive strategies
Close out games with flying creatures and card advantage after Lorien Revealed clears the board

keep_criteria: Hands containing Snuff Out or early Spellstutter Sprite
Balanced curves with at least two sources of interaction or flying creatures
Lorien Revealed paired with early counters or removal
Keep hands with 2–3 lands (prioritizing duals or fixing), at least one Spellstutter Sprite or equivalent turn-1 threat, and a counterspell or removal suite.
Prioritize hands that can execute a turn-1 Sprite or turn-2 Lorien Revealed while retaining mana for disruption.
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking any instant-speed interaction or early plays
Overloaded with late-game sorceries like Lorien Revealed without early defense
No flying creatures or life loss triggers to apply pressure
Mulligan if you have three or more lands with no early plays, or three or more spells with no lands.

early_game: Deploy Spellstutter Sprite immediately to start triggering life loss on opponent spells
Use Snuff Out to counter high-impact creature spells or early threats
Establish a flying presence to pressure the opponent while maintaining board control
Turn 1: Play a land, cast Spellstutter Sprite to establish early disruption and board presence.
Turn 2: Play a land, cast Lorien Revealed or another threat, or hold up mana for counterspells/removal.
Sequence lands to ensure consistent blue/black mana.
If the opponent casts a key spell, use counterspells or Sprite’s sacrifice ability to disrupt their plan.
Never tap out for Lorien Revealed if you lack protection or disruption.
mid_game: Time Lorien Revealed to clear multiple opponent creatures and gain substantial life
Continue applying -1/-1 counters to shrink threats and enable favorable trades
Maintain hand of instant-speed interaction to disrupt opponent's key turns
Manage mana to hold up for counterspells and removal while developing Lorien Revealed.
Use Spellstutter Sprite’s sacrifice ability sparingly for high-impact spells.
Track your graveyard for potential recursion threats and avoid overcommitting to Lorien tokens if the board is unstable.
Prioritize card advantage to outlast opponents in longer games.
Commit threats when you have board presence or can protect them with counterspells and removal.
Hold back if the opponent has sweepers or heavy removal.
late_game: Leverage accumulated life advantage and card draw to outvalue the opponent
Use remaining counters and removal to protect your flying finishers
Close the game by repeatedly triggering Sprite on opponent's recovery spells
Lorien Revealed token army, resilient flying creatures, or targeted removal to clear the path.
Use card advantage to outlast opponents and close out games before they can stabilize.
Leverage flash removal to answer late-game threats and secure victory.
Go all-in when you have Lorien Revealed on the board, sufficient mana to protect it, and the opponent has no sweepers or heavy removal.
Also commit when you’ve disrupted their key spells and can close out before they recover.
Use token generation to overwhelm opponents who lack board wipes.

key_cards.name: Spellstutter Sprite
key_cards.role: Primary life loss engine and board presence
key_cards.notes: Play early to maximize triggers; target opponent's largest creatures with -1/-1 counters to shrink threats while draining life

key_cards.name: Snuff Out
key_cards.notes: Prioritize countering creature spells to trigger the -1/-1 counter clause; use to protect your board or set up favorable trades

key_cards.name: Lorien Revealed
key_cards.role: Board clear and life gain stabilizer
key_cards.notes: Cast when opponent has multiple creatures to maximize board wipe effect and life gain; use to reset unfavorable board states

sequencing_tips: Hold Snuff Out until the opponent commits to a high-value spell to maximize the -1/-1 counter trigger
Trigger Spellstutter Sprite on opponent's spells rather than your own to avoid self-inflicted counters
Cast Lorien Revealed after the opponent has played multiple creatures to maximize life gain and board impact
Common mistakes include overcommitting to Lorien Revealed without protection, misusing Spellstutter Sprite’s sacrifice ability on low-impact spells, and failing to track opponent mana for sweepers.
Unique interactions: Sprite’s ability can be used to counter your own spells if needed, and Lorien Revealed tokens are flying and can be pumped.
Always prioritize keeping your board state flexible and avoid tapping out for non-essential plays.
Practice stack manipulation to maximize disruption and protect your key permanents.

matchups.advice: Prioritize countering early threats with Snuff Out and use Sprite to drain life while trading efficiently
Apply consistent flying pressure and life loss to force them to use removal inefficiently
Disrupt their key value creatures with Snuff Out and use Lorien Revealed to reset their board development

Use Spellstutter Sprite to make their counterspells more expensive. Cast threats in response to their counterspells to exploit the stack. Use flash removal (Snuff Out) to answer threats after they resolve. Prioritize card advantage to out-resource their disruption.

Prioritize early disruption and removal to slow their acceleration. Use Snuff Out to answer big threats before they can stabilize. Lorien Revealed can outvalue ramp if you survive the early game. Disrupt their mana sources and key spells to prevent them from reaching their win conditions.

Win the resource war. Prioritize card advantage, protect Lorien Revealed, and use counterspells to disrupt their key spells. Win the removal race by targeting their threats efficiently. Track their mana to identify windows for disruption and avoid overcommitting into potential sweepers.

common_threats: Fast aggressive creatures that bypass flying
Uncounterable spells or creatures with hexproof
Board wipes that remove counters and clear your board
Watch for sweepers (e.g., board wipes, tide effects), heavy removal, and combo win conditions.
Note when opponents tap out for key spells to identify windows for disruption.
Track the graveyard for potential recursion or graveyard-based strategies.
Pay attention to mana development to anticipate when opponents can cast their most threatening spells.
